personality_traits: full of accounts of wonders seen
either genuinely devout or very committed to the cover
speaking_style: Earnest and enthusiastic storytelling, punctuated by pious exclamations. Claims to have witnessed remarkable things. Hard to tell if they believe all of it themselves.
backstory_seeds: traveling to a distant shrine to honor a vow made during an illness they survived against all expectation
claims to have witnessed a genuine miracle at the last shrine, though the details shift slightly each time they tell it
has been on the road for six weeks and is finding the pilgrimage harder than the priest made it sound
using the pilgrimage as cover for business that has nothing to do with salvation
met an extraordinary collection of people on the road and has detailed opinions about all of them
genuinely uncertain whether the faith is sustaining the journey or the journey is sustaining the faith
